company.name: Nomadic Trails
company.description: We are a local Mongolian tour operator specialising in authentic adventures, cultural immersions, and festival experiences across the Land of the Blue Sky.

testimonials.text: The horseback archery tour was a once‑in‑a‑lifetime experience. The guides were professional and the landscapes breathtaking.
testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson

testimonials.text: Visiting the reindeer herders in Khuvsgul was magical. The organisation was flawless and we learned so much about their traditions.
testimonials.name: Markus Weber

testimonials.text: The Golden Eagle Festival exceeded all expectations. Highly recommend this trip!
testimonials.name: Elena Petrov

cultural_notes.shaman: Shamanism is an ancient spiritual practice in Mongolia. You may witness a 'böö' ceremony with drumming, chanting, and offerings to nature spirits.
cultural_notes.horse_archery: Mongolian horseback archery dates back to Genghis Khan. Archers shoot at small leather balls while galloping – a true test of skill.
cultural_notes.khuvsgul: Lake Khuvsgul is the 'Blue Pearl of Mongolia', sacred to reindeer herders and home to unique wildlife and pristine nature.
cultural_notes.ice_festival: The Ice Festival on Lake Khuvsgul features ice sculptures, horse sledding, shaman rituals, and traditional games – held every March.
cultural_notes.eagle: Kazakh eagle hunters train golden eagles to hunt foxes and hares. The bond between hunter and bird is legendary.
cultural_notes.naadam: Naadam is the 'Three Manly Games' – wrestling, horse racing, and archery. Held nationwide in July.
cultural_notes.eagle_hunter: Visiting a real eagle hunter's family offers insight into their nomadic life, with demonstrations of eagle calling and hunting techniques.
cultural_notes.gobi: The Gobi Desert is a vast landscape of sand dunes, dinosaur fossils, and camel herding nomads. Don't miss the Flaming Cliffs.
cultural_notes.terelj: Terelj National Park is known for its granite rock formations, meadows, and the iconic 'Turtle Rock'. Perfect for short treks.
cultural_notes.altai: The Altai Mountains are remote and rugged, home to the Tuvan and Kazakh communities. Ideal for horse trekking and eagle hunting.

1.title: 1‑Day Horseback Archery Experience
days: Day 1: Meet your guide and horses at Terelj. Brief training on horseback archery. Afternoon practice session with traditional Mongolian bows. Return to Ulaanbaatar.

3.title: 3‑Day Horseback Archery & Nomadic Stay
days: Day 1: Drive to Terelj. Archery training on foot and horseback. Overnight in ger camp.
Day 2: Full day archery practice, including moving targets. Learn from experienced archers. Evening folklore performance.
Day 3: Morning competition among group. Return to UB.

5.title: 5‑Day Horseback Archery Expedition
days: Day 1: Arrival, archery basics.
Day 2‑3: Intensive riding and shooting, longer treks.
Day 4: Archery contest and cultural exchange with local herders.
Day 5: Return to UB.

7.title: 7‑Day Ultimate Horseback Archery & Adventure
days: Day 1: Training.
Day 2‑4: Cross‑country ride with archery challenges.
Day 5: Visit to nomadic family for archery demonstration.
Day 6: Final competition and prize ceremony.
Day 7: Return to UB.

9.title: 9‑Day Khuvsgul Reindeer Tribe Winter Expedition
days: Day 1: Fly to Mörön, drive to Khuvsgul Lake.
Day 2‑3: Meet Tsaatan reindeer herders. Learn about their winter life, ride reindeer.
Day 4‑6: Trek by reindeer or horse through snow‑covered taiga.
Day 7: Return to lake shore, visit ice formations.
Day 8: Drive back to Mörön, flight to UB.
Day 9: Departure.

7.title: 7‑Day Bulgan Horse Riding & Forest Trails
days: Day 1: Drive to Bulgan province. Meet horses.
Day 2‑5: Daily horse treks through birch forests and river valleys, camping with local herders.
Day 6: Return to UB.
Day 7: Departure.

10.title: 10‑Day Bulgan Horse Riding Deep Dive
days: Day 1‑2: Travel and acclimatisation.
Day 3‑7: Extended horse trek across Bulgan, visiting monasteries and hot springs.
Day 8‑9: Return journey, cultural show.
Day 10: Departure.

7.title: 7‑Day Western Mongolia Horse Riding (Altai)
days: Day 1: Fly to Ölgii, meet Kazakh guides.
Day 2‑4: Horse trek around Altai Tavan Bogd mountains.
Day 5: Visit eagle hunter family.
Day 6: Fly back to UB.
Day 7: Departure.

3.title: 3‑Day Terelj Dog Sledding & Horse Riding Winter
days: Day 1: Drive to Terelj. Dog sledding orientation, short ride.
Day 2: Full day dog sledding in snow‑covered valley, afternoon horse riding.
Day 3: Morning horse ride, return to UB.

1.title: 1‑Day Terelj Short Trek
days: Day 1: Hike to Turtle Rock, Aryabal Meditation Temple. Return to UB.

2.title: 2‑Day Terelj Trek & Ger Stay
days: Day 1: Trek to Turtle Rock, overnight in ger.
Day 2: Trek to river valley, visit nomadic family, return.

3.title: 3‑Day Terelj Trekking Adventure
days: Day 1: Arrival, short hike.
Day 2: Full day trek to Khagiin Khar Lake.
Day 3: Return via scenic route.

11.title: 11‑Day Mountain Lakes and Reindeer (Northern Mongolia)
days: Day 1: Fly to Mörön.
Day 2‑4: Drive to Tsagaannuur, meet Tsaatan.
Day 5‑7: Trek to Shishged River, ride reindeer.
Day 8‑9: Explore mountain lakes, wildlife viewing.
Day 10: Return to Mörön, flight.
Day 11: Departure.

5.title: 5‑Day Golden Eagle Festival Experience
days: Day 1: Fly to Ölgii. City tour.
Day 2: Opening ceremony of Golden Eagle Festival. Competitions: eagle calling, agility, beauty contest.
Day 3: Second day of festival, Kazakh games like Kok‑par (goat dragging).
Day 4: Visit eagle hunter's family, optional short horse ride.
Day 5: Fly back to UB.

2.title: 2‑Day Naadam Festival in Ulaanbaatar
days: Day 1: Central Stadium opening ceremony, wrestling and archery competitions.
Day 2: Horse racing at Hui Doloon Khudag, evening closing concert.

12.title: 12‑Day Naadam Arvaikheer & Central Mongolia Tour
days: Day 1‑2: Naadam in UB.
Day 3‑4: Drive to Arvaikheer, local Naadam.
Day 5‑8: Explore Orkhon Valley, Kharkhorin, Erdene Zuu monastery.
Day 9‑11: Horse trek to Tuvkhun Monastery, return to UB.
Day 12: Departure.

7.title: 7‑Day Ice Festival & Reindeer (Land Tour)
days: Day 1: Drive from UB to Khuvsgul (overland).
Day 2‑3: Ice Festival on Lake Khuvsgul – ice sculptures, reindeer sledding, shaman rituals.
Day 4‑5: Visit Tsaatan reindeer herders, stay in teepee.
Day 6: Return drive to UB.
Day 7: Departure.

9.title: 9‑Day Ice Festival & Reindeer (Flight + Land)
days: Day 1: Fly to Mörön, drive to lake.
Day 2‑3: Ice Festival activities.
Day 4‑6: Deep into taiga to meet reindeer herders, winter trek.
Day 7‑8: Return via Mörön, flight to UB.
Day 9: Departure.

10.title: 10‑Day Shamanic Journey & Northern Mongolia
days: Day 1: UB city tour, visit Shaman's Centre.
Day 2: Fly to Mörön, drive to Khuvsgul.
Day 3‑5: Participate in shamanic ceremonies, learn about spirit world.
Day 6‑8: Trek to sacred mountain, overnight at shaman's family.
Day 9: Return to UB.
Day 10: Departure.

5.title: 5‑Day Eagle Hunter Visit (Western Mongolia)
days: Day 1: Fly to Ölgii, city tour.
Day 2: Day with eagle hunter family – demonstration, photo session.
Day 3: Horse ride to nearby mountains, watch eagle hunt.
Day 4: Return to Ölgii, fly to UB.
Day 5: Departure.

7.title: 7‑Day Deep Eagle Hunter Experience
days: Day 1: Fly to Ölgii.
Day 2‑4: Stay with eagle hunter, learn training methods, participate in hunting.
Day 5‑6: Trek to Sagsai village, meet multiple hunters, attend local competition.
Day 7: Return to UB.

5.title: 5‑Day Reindeer Tribe Visit (Short)
days: Day 1: Fly to Mörön, drive to Khuvsgul.
Day 2‑3: Visit Tsaatan camp, ride reindeer, overnight in tipi.
Day 4: Return to Mörön, flight to UB.
Day 5: Departure.

8.title: 8‑Day Reindeer Tribe Visit (Extended)
days: Day 1: Fly to Mörön.
Day 2‑4: Deep taiga trek to reindeer herders.
Day 5‑6: Live with tribe, learn their customs, help with herding.
Day 7: Return to Mörön, fly to UB.
Day 8: Departure.

8.title: 8‑Day Mongolia Photography Tour
days: Day 1: UB orientation, National Museum.
Day 2: Drive to Terelj – rock formations, nomad portraits.
Day 3‑4: Gobi Desert – sand dunes, camel caravans, sunset shoots.
Day 5‑6: Kharkhorin – Erdene Zuu monastery, Orkhon waterfall.
Day 7: Return to UB, photo review session.
Day 8: Departure.

4.title: 4‑Day Gobi Desert Express
days: Day 1: Fly to Dalanzadgad. Drive to Yol Valley (ice canyon).
Day 2: Khongor Sand Dunes – camel riding, sand dune sunrise.
Day 3: Bayanzag (Flaming Cliffs) – dinosaur fossils. Return to Dalanzadgad.
Day 4: Fly back to UB.

6.title: 6‑Day Gobi Discovery Tour
days: Day 1: Fly to Gobi, Yol Valley.
Day 2: Khongor Sand Dunes, camel trek.
Day 3: Bayanzag, explore canyons.
Day 4: Drive to Gurvan Saikhan mountains, hiking.
Day 5: Visit nomadic camel herders, return to Dalanzadgad.
Day 6: Morning flight to UB.

1.title: 1‑Day UB & Terelj Highlights
days: Day 1: Sukhbaatar Square, Gandan Monastery, then afternoon drive to Terelj for short hike – return evening.

2.title: 2‑Day UB City & Terelj Overnight
days: Day 1: UB city tour (museums, monastery).
Day 2: Terelj National Park – Turtle Rock, Aryabal Temple, ger camp lunch – return to UB.

3.title: 3‑Day Ulaanbaatar & Terelj Relaxed Tour
days: Day 1: UB sightseeing.
Day 2: Terelj full day with nomadic family visit and short horse ride.
Day 3: Free morning, departure.

5.title: 5‑Day Kharhorin, Mini Gobi & Hustai National Park
days: Day 1: Drive to Hustai National Park – wild Przewalski horses.
Day 2: Continue to Kharkhorin, visit Erdene Zuu monastery.
Day 3: Drive to Mini Gobi (Elsen Tasarkhai) – camel ride, sand dunes.
Day 4: Return to UB via Khustai for more horse watching.
Day 5: Departure.

standard: Accommodation in hotels, ger camps or tents as per itinerary
All meals specified in itinerary (breakfast, lunch, dinner)
Park entrance fees and local taxes
Horse or camel riding where indicated
flight: Domestic flights (e.g. UB – Mörön, UB – Ölgii, UB – Dalanzadgad)
Airport transfers on domestic flight days

exclusions: Extra activities not mentioned in itinerary
